Days Hours Minutes Seconds

Stake your $BCB tokens to receive a 100% share of the platform profits generated from the Sportsbook, Casino, Arcade and Poker offers.


The staking process involves an initial 30 day lock. To be eligible to claim your percentage of the platform profits you must have staked your tokens for a minimum of 7 days. Once you have reached this period, you will continue to receive platform profits on a continual basis until you un-stake your $BCB tokens.

30 day lock
  • 30 day lock

Contact support if you get transaction errors, do not force a transaction that will fail!

Platform profits are determined by the currency used to place bets and/or play on the platform over a specific time period, minus any operating expenses. By staking your $BCB tokens, you will receive staking rewards in $ETH, $USDT and $BCB.
